required_functions.OnInit: Called once when EA starts - initialize variables, handles, indicators
required_functions.OnDeinit: Called when EA stops - cleanup, close handles, free resources
required_functions.OnTick: Called on every tick - main trading logic, signal detection, order management
required_functions.OnStart: For scripts only - main execution function

mandatory: OnInit() - must return INIT_SUCCEEDED or error code
best_practices: Check if new bar before processing (avoid multiple trades per bar)
Use magic number to identify EA's own positions

methods: Buy(volume, symbol, price, sl, tp, comment)
Sell(volume, symbol, price, sl, tp, comment)
PositionOpen(symbol, type, volume, price, sl, tp, comment)
CTrade.note: Does NOT have CalcMargin() - use AccountInfoDouble() instead

methods: Ticket(), Symbol(), Type(), Volume(), PriceOpen(), PriceCurrent(), StopLoss(), TakeProfit()
Name(), Bid(), Ask(), Point(), Digits(), ContractSize()

OrderSend.note: Low-level, use CTrade instead for simplicity

PositionOpen.signature: bool PositionOpen(symbol, type, volume, price, sl, tp, comment)

static_vs_dynamic.static: double arr[10]; - fixed size, cannot use ArraySetAsSeries()
static_vs_dynamic.dynamic: double arr[]; - variable size, can use ArraySetAsSeries()

pitfall_1.fix: Use dynamic arrays: double arr[]; ArrayResize(arr, size);

pitfall_3.fix: Use AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE) to check available margin

pitfall_4.fix: Check if new bar: if(iTime() == lastTime) return;

pitfall_5.issue: Not checking if position exists before closing
pitfall_5.fix: Use CPositionInfo to verify position exists first

pitfall_6.fix: Use input parameter: input ulong MagicNumber = 20260529;

9_performance_tips.tip_1: Only process on new bar, not every tick
9_performance_tips.tip_2: Cache indicator handles, don't create new ones every tick
9_performance_tips.tip_3: Use CopyBuffer() instead of iClose() in loops
9_performance_tips.tip_5: Use static variables for persistent data
